question: Is the image style a realistic photo?
Does the lighting indicate early morning sunrise with golden sunlight coming from the left side?
Is there a light wooden lifeguard watchtower located in the right-center of the frame with stairs below?
Do the watchtower and stairs cast long shadows on the sand?
Are there exactly two rescue equipment items placed side by side on the watchtower platform?
Is there a red rescue float board lying horizontally with its head pointing toward the left?
Is there a fluorescent green rescue buoy lying horizontally next to the red float board?
Are there exactly two life rings hanging on the platform railing?
Is one life ring white with four red straps?
Is the other life ring transparent, refracting sunlight with bright edges?
Is there a light blue towel draped on the railing with one corner slightly lifted?
Are there exactly two triangular warning flags planted on the left side of the frame?
Are the flags arranged in a front-back arrangement with thin poles casting shadows?
Is the front flag pure yellow with no pattern?
Is the back flag pure purple with no pattern?
Is there a trail of footprints on the sand leading toward the stairs and turning at the steps?
Is there a drag mark on the sand beside the footprints?
Is there a wooden crate located in the lower-center of the frame?
Are there black binoculars on the crate with barrels pointing toward the upper right?
Is there a white megaphone lying flat on the crate with the horn facing left and no markings?
Is there a handheld walkie-talkie device on the crate with a pure black, unlit screen?
Is there a pure white sunscreen bottle with a light blue cap and no label standing in front of the crate?
Is there a semi-transparent purple spray bottle with no label standing beside the white sunscreen bottle?
Is there a red first aid kit placed on the sand in the lower right near the tower base?
Is there an empty transparent plastic water bottle lying on its side in the lower left?
Does the water bottle mouth face right with bright edges from sunlight?
Does the background show a calm sea surface with a sunlight reflection band extending toward the distance?
Are there exactly seven seagulls flying in the upper left sky?
